hooks.command: m=$(jq -r '[.tool_input.new_string, .tool_input.content, (.tool_input.edits[]?.new_string)] | map(select(. != null)) | .[]' 2>/dev/null | grep -niE '(^[[:space:]]*[*#]|//).*(used to|previously|formerly|replace[sd]? the old|renamed? (to|from)|no longer|was renamed)'); if [ -n "$m" ]; then jq -n --arg m "$m" '{decision:"block", reason:("A comment in this edit reads like changelog / what-the-code-USED-TO-do narration. CLAUDE.md bans this (do not describe what code used to do; use git history). Remove the historical framing; state only the current contract. Flagged:\n" + $m), systemMessage:"comment-history hook: flagged a changelog-style comment"}'; fi
